systemPrompt: NLP tool chains: translate, sentiment, summarize, classify

steps.prompt: Translate 'I love this product, it is amazing!' to Spanish, then analyze the sentiment of the translation. Answer only with the sentiment label.

Summarize the following text into one sentence: 'The stock market rallied sharply today as investors cheered strong earnings reports from major tech companies. The S&P 500 gained 2.3% while the Nasdaq surged 3.1%.'. Then classify the summary. Answer only with the topic.
Extract person names from 'Alice met Bob and Charlie at the cafe'. Then convert the result to uppercase. Answer only with the text.
